name: Mobile Profile Hero
description: Large photo header for mobile profile pages. Full-bleed cover photo (40-50vh), circular avatar overlapping the cover bottom edge, name+age+bio stack, and a row of action buttons (Edit on own profile / Message+Like+Report on other). Sticky-scroll behavior: avatar shrinks as user scrolls down. Differs from storefront-hero (desktop-leaning, wider proportions) by being mobile-optimized with portrait photo and thumb-friendly action sizing.

own-profile.description: Profile hero for the current user (own /me route). Single Edit button as the primary action. Cover photo is large, avatar overlaps bottom edge, bio sits below.

other-profile.description: Profile hero for another user (/u/:id route). Three action buttons: Message (primary), Like Again (secondary), Report (tertiary). Includes a back button at top-left.

compact-scrolled.description: Collapsed state when user has scrolled past the hero. Sticky bar at top with small avatar + name + back button. Used in conjunction with sticky-scroll behavior.

visual_brief: A vertical hero block at the top of the profile page. The CoverPhoto fills the full width and 45vh of viewport height (capped at 360px) — a full-bleed background image (object-fit cover, object-position center). For own-profile in absence of a cover, render a soft peach-to-coral gradient. A GradientOverlay sits on the bottom 40% of the cover: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, transparent 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.45) 100%) — ensures any text or avatar reads cleanly. At top-left of the cover (in other-profile preset) sits the BackButton: a 36×36 circular glassy button (rgba(0,0,0,0.4) backdrop-blur 8px) with a 18px ChevronLeft Lucide icon in white. At top-right (in own-profile and other-profile both): a MoreMenuButton — same 36×36 glassy circle with a 18px MoreHorizontal icon, opens a dropdown for share/report/block actions. Overlapping the bottom edge of the CoverPhoto: AvatarFrame — a 96×96 circular avatar with the swipecircle-photo-frame decorator (coral-to-accent gradient ring, soft shadow), positioned absolute (bottom: -48px, left: 24px). The avatar overlaps so half is on the photo, half breaks below into the page surface. Below the cover (with 64px top padding to clear the overlapping avatar), an InfoStack: NameAge (font-display, text-2xl, font-bold) — 'Maya, 27'. DistanceTag inline below — 12px MapPin icon + '3 km away · Active 2h ago' (text-xs, muted). A Bio paragraph below: 1-3 sentences, font-size 15px, line-height 1.5, color var(--d-text). 16px below the bio, the ActionRow: a horizontal row of pill buttons. In own-profile: a single full-width-or-half-width 'Edit Profile' button (swipecircle-pill decorator, primary fill, with Edit icon). In other-profile: three buttons in a row — 'Message' (primary pill, ~50% width), 'Like Again' (secondary pill, white border, 25% width with Heart icon), 'Report' (tertiary, icon-only ghost button, 25% width with Flag icon). On scroll: as user scrolls down the page, the AvatarFrame shrinks from 96×96 to 56×56 over the first 200px of scroll, the CoverPhoto translates upward at 0.4× scroll speed (parallax), and at scroll > 240px, the compact-scrolled variant takes over — a sticky bar at top with the small avatar + name + back button. The hero block disappears off-screen normally.

layout_hints.cover_height: 45vh capped at 360px on portrait, 50vh capped at 400px on landscape
layout_hints.avatar_overlap: AvatarFrame absolute-positioned with bottom: -48px so it overlaps the cover-bottom edge
layout_hints.info_padding_top: 64px on InfoStack to clear the overlapping avatar
layout_hints.sticky_scroll: Avatar shrinks 96→56px over first 200px of scroll; cover parallaxes at 0.4×
layout_hints.buttons: ActionRow uses pill shapes with icon prefix; min height 44px for tap targets

slots.hero: Outer container. Position relative (so AvatarFrame absolute-anchors here). Flex-col. Width 100%. No background — content layers do the visual work.
slots.cover-photo: Position relative. Width 100%. Height 45vh (capped at 360px portrait / 400px landscape). Img with object-fit cover, object-position center. Fallback: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--d-accent), var(--d-primary)). Has data-parallax attribute for scroll-driven translateY.
slots.gradient-overlay: Position absolute, inset 0 (or just bottom 40%). Linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, transparent 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.45) 100%). Pointer-events none.
slots.back-button: Conditional in other-profile preset. Position absolute, top: 16px (or 16px + safe-area-inset-top), left: 16px, z-index 5. 36×36 circular button. Background rgba(0,0,0,0.4) with backdrop-blur 8px. ChevronLeft icon 18px white. On click: navigates back via history.back() or emits 'navigate-back'.
slots.more-menu-button: Position absolute, top: 16px (or 16px + safe-area-inset-top), right: 16px, z-index 5. 36×36 circular glassy button. MoreHorizontal icon 18px white. On click: opens dropdown sheet with share/report/block actions.
slots.avatar-frame: Position absolute, bottom: -48px, left: 24px, z-index 4. 96×96. Applies swipecircle-photo-frame decorator. Gets data-scrolled attribute that shrinks the frame to 56×56 with translateY when user scrolls > 200px.
slots.avatar: Img inside the AvatarFrame. width 100%, height 100%, border-radius 9999px, object-fit cover. Fallback: solid surface color with a centered User icon at 36px.
slots.info-stack: Padding 64px 24px 16px 24px (the 64px top clears the overlapping avatar). Flex-col, gap 4px (between name and distance), gap 12px (after distance, before bio). Background var(--d-bg).
slots.name-age: Span: 'Name, Age'. Font-family var(--d-font-display). Font-size 24px. Font-weight 700. Color var(--d-text). Line-height 1.2.
slots.distance-tag: Inline span with 12px MapPin icon + location text + ' · ' + activity text. Font-size 12px. Font-weight 500. Color var(--d-text-muted). Display flex, items-center, gap 4px.
slots.bio: Paragraph. Font-size 15px. Font-weight 400. Color var(--d-text). Line-height 1.5. Max 3 lines (line-clamp 3 in compact contexts; uncapped on full profile view).
slots.action-row: Flex-row, gap 8px. Padding 16px 24px. Background var(--d-bg). In own-profile: single Edit button at 100% width. In other-profile: Message (flex-grow), Like Again (auto), Report (auto, icon only).
slots.edit-button: Pill button (swipecircle-pill decorator). Full width. 'Edit Profile' label with leading 16px Edit Lucide icon. Min height 44px.
slots.message-button: Pill button (swipecircle-pill decorator). Flex-grow, 'Message' label with leading 16px Send icon. Primary action.
slots.like-button: Pill button with white border + transparent fill. 'Like Again' label with leading 16px Heart icon. Auto-width.
slots.report-button: Icon-only ghost button, 44×44. 18px Flag icon in muted color. Tertiary action — opens report flow.

keyboard: Tab: cycle focus through BackButton, MoreMenuButton, action buttons
Enter or Space: activate focused button
accessibility.focus_management: Initial focus on page load goes to the InfoStack heading (NameAge). When the more-menu opens, focus moves into the menu items. When the menu closes, focus returns to MoreMenuButton.

responsive.mobile: Stack layout. Cover 45vh capped 360px. Avatar 96×96. ActionRow buttons stack as flex-row with proportional widths. Single-column layout (this is the mobile-default).
responsive.tablet: Stack layout. Same as mobile — the mobile-tab-bar shell caps at 480px regardless of viewport. Hero proportions preserved.
responsive.desktop: Stack layout. Same as mobile/tablet inside the 480px column. Hover states active on action buttons (lift + shadow).

micro.avatar-shrink: On scroll: scale 1→0.583 (96px to 56px) + translateY 0→-20px over scroll range 0-200px (scroll-linked, not time-based)
micro.cover-parallax: On scroll: translateY 0→-(scrollY × 0.4) — cover scrolls at 40% of body scroll speed
micro.button-press: scale(0.96) for 80ms then spring to scale(1) over 200ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)

transitions.compact-bar-fade-in: When scroll passes 240px, the compact-scrolled bar slides in from translateY(-100%) to 0 over 200ms ease-out, with backdrop-blur smoothly engaging
transitions.stagger-entrance: On page load: cover fades in (opacity 0→1, 320ms), avatar scales in (0.8→1 with 120ms delay), info-stack stagger (name 240ms, distance 60ms after, bio 60ms after, actions 60ms after) — total ~520ms cascade

composition.CoverContainer: Div(relative, full-width, 45vh) > [CoverPhoto(absolute-fill) + GradientOverlay(absolute-bottom-half) + BackButton(absolute-top-left, conditional) + MoreMenuButton(absolute-top-right) + AvatarFrame(absolute-bottom-overlap)]
